card_description: Daniel (Hebrew: "God is my judge") is a historical figure appearing in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. In the biblical tradition, Daniel is prophet and interpreter of dreams in babylon. Dream interpretation parallels PKD's visionary claims. Appears in 6 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Daniel. Context: "Dick reconciles his dualistic visions (J-J vs."

linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_04.txt
